nasb.text: Then he left there and went to the house of a man named Titius Justus, a worshiper of God, whose house was next to the synagogue.

esv.text: And he left there and went to the house of a man named Titius Justus, a worshiper of God. His house was next door to the synagogue.

cnv.text: 他離開那裡，到了提多．猶士都的家去。這人是敬拜　神的，他的家靠近會堂。

ccb.text: 保罗就离开那里，来到一位敬畏上帝、名叫提多·犹士都的人家里，他家就在会堂隔壁。

csbs.text: 于是他离开那里，进到一个名叫提多犹斯托的人家里。这个人敬拜神，他的家就在会堂隔壁。
